boundaries.name: archive
boundaries.summary: Historical snapshots and large reference datasets (Read-Only)

boundaries.name: repo_docs
boundaries.summary: The 'Map' – Design specs, user guides, and theory docs

boundaries.name: roadmap
boundaries.summary: Project roadmaps and future plans

boundaries.name: docs_core
boundaries.summary: Core documentation and specs (excluding archive/agent)

boundaries.name: repo_theory
boundaries.summary: The 'Source of Truth' – Core schemas, dimensions, and model definitions

boundaries.name: repo_tool
boundaries.summary: The 'Engine' – Collider logic, analysis pipeline, and AI tools

boundaries.name: archeology
boundaries.summary: The Geologic Record (Generation 2 Analysis)

boundaries.name: constraints
boundaries.summary: Constraint Field system (profiles, engine, rules)

boundaries.name: viz_core
boundaries.summary: Visualization core (control bar, data manager, template)

boundaries.name: theory
boundaries.summary: Theoretical framework and documentation

boundaries.name: schema
boundaries.summary: All schema definitions (atoms, roles, dimensions)

boundaries.name: pipeline
boundaries.summary: Main analysis pipeline (driver, graph builder, extractors)

boundaries.name: classifiers
boundaries.summary: All classifier logic (identifying atoms and roles)

boundaries.name: architecture_review
boundaries.summary: Full architecture review (pipeline + classifiers + constraints)

boundaries.name: implementation_review
boundaries.summary: Implementation review (pipeline + schema + theory)

boundaries.name: brain
boundaries.summary: [LARGE] Full context-management directory

boundaries.name: body
boundaries.summary: [EXCEEDS LIMIT] Full src - use 'pipeline' or 'classifiers' instead

boundaries.name: viz
boundaries.summary: [EXCEEDS LIMIT] Full viz - use 'viz_core' instead

boundaries.name: complete
boundaries.summary: [DANGEROUS] Entire repo (excluding archive) - will exceed any context window

boundaries.name: role_registry
boundaries.summary: Role normalization system

boundaries.name: tests
boundaries.summary: Test files for validation

boundaries.name: research_core
boundaries.summary: Core research artifacts (investigation + protocol)

boundaries.name: research_tools
boundaries.summary: Research tooling (coverage, inventory, corpus runner)

boundaries.name: research_atoms
boundaries.summary: Atom definitions for coverage analysis (explicit, no noise)

boundaries.name: research_full
boundaries.summary: Complete research context (documents + tools + atoms)

boundaries.name: research_validation
boundaries.summary: Research validation context (classifiers + tests + claims)

boundaries.name: deck
boundaries.summary: Decision Deck cards and state (certified moves for AI agents)

boundaries.name: deck_cards
boundaries.summary: All card definitions (no state, just definitions)

boundaries.name: deck_state
boundaries.summary: Current deck state (meters + play history)

boundaries.name: agent_session
boundaries.summary: Active Decision Deck session state (real-time context)

boundaries.name: agent_kernel
boundaries.summary: Agent boot protocol and manifest (~30k tokens)

boundaries.name: agent_tasks
boundaries.summary: Active tasks, sprints, and registry (~50k tokens)

boundaries.name: agent_intelligence
boundaries.summary: BARE truths, drift reports, metrics (~40k tokens)

boundaries.name: agent_specs
boundaries.summary: BARE spec, workflows, schemas (~60k tokens)

boundaries.name: agent_full
boundaries.summary: Complete .agent/ context for task/planning queries (~150k tokens)

boundaries.name: aci_core
boundaries.summary: ACI module source code - the curriculum compiler

boundaries.name: aci_siblings
boundaries.summary: ACI sibling subsystems (HSL, Perplexity, analyze.py)

boundaries.name: aci_audit
boundaries.summary: Full ACI audit context - code + config + siblings + docs
